servinfo.title: MAF and IAT Sensor Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: MAF and IAT Sensor On-Vehicle Inspection

attention4.ptxt: Failure to take proper precautions when handling the MAF and IAT sensor may lead to malfunction of the sensor.

item.ptxt: Do not disassemble the MAF and IAT sensors.
Do not drop or otherwise expose the MAF and IAT sensors to shock. Any MAF and IAT sensor that has been dropped must be replaced.
Do not clean the MAF and IAT sensors.
Do not direct compressed air from an air blow gun or the like to the MAF and IAT sensor.
Do not put a finger or any other object into the MAF and IAT sensor.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect MAF and IAT sensor connector.
Remove MAF and IAT sensor (1) from air cleaner assembly.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following point.

item.ptxt: Tighten MAF and IAT sensor screws (1) to specified torque.
